overall.description: A first-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle in Cyberpunk 2077, descending from high altitude over a wasteland into the dense neon-lit streets of Night City. The vehicle navigates between futuristic skyscrapers and holographic advertisements under an overcast sky during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude flight over wasteland approaching megacity

events.description: begins descending from high altitude toward the wasteland below
industrial structures and highway ramps become visible on the ground

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle at high altitude over the wasteland with the city skyline visible in the distance

entered.detail: distant mountain silhouette against the cloudy sky
futuristic megacity towers visible on the horizon
futuristic cockpit interface with holographic speedometer display
left side mirror reflecting the cloudy sky
barren industrial ground below with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude cockpit view overlooking a vast wasteland with distant mountains. The vehicle descends gradually toward the industrial ground below while the futuristic city skyline remains visible on the horizon under an overcast golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: low altitude flight over industrial wasteland

events.description: slows down significantly while maintaining low altitude over the wasteland
approaching the edge of the dense urban area with towers looming ahead

agents.ego_description: flying low over the barren industrial wasteland with power lines and highway interchanges passing below at reduced speed

entered.detail: curved highway ramps and overpasses on the ground below
tall electrical transmission towers lining the wasteland

segments.scene_description: Flying at low altitude over the desolate industrial wasteland, the vehicle passes highway interchanges and power pylons while slowing down. The city skyline grows larger ahead as the mountains recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: entering the urban canyon between megacity towers

events.description: enters the dense urban canyon between towering glass skyscrapers
another flying vehicle becomes visible in the distance on the left side

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow gaps between futuristic glass skyscrapers and neon-lit towers at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: distant flying vehicle traveling in the same direction through the urban canyon

entered.detail: tall reflective glass and steel buildings forming the urban canyon walls
towers emitting blue and red holographic light displays
distant flying vehicle visible in the air traffic

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the dense urban canyon, leaving the wasteland behind. Glass skyscrapers rise on both sides while neon holographic towers glow in the distance. Another flying vehicle appears in the distance as the camera navigates through the towering structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with massive holographic advertisements

events.description: surrounded by bright holographic billboards and neon signs illuminating the cockpit
flying vehicle passes closely on the left side at high speed

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through the dense urban canyon surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle passing by on the left at close range

entered.detail: large red holographic advertisement floating between buildings
tall building with distinctive Arasaka corporation signage

segments.scene_description: Deep within the urban canyon, the vehicle is surrounded by massive holographic billboards and neon signs. The Arasaka tower dominates the view ahead while another flying vehicle passes closely on the left. The environment is densely packed with towering structures and bright artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a desolate high-altitude wasteland into the claustrophobic, neon-drenched canyons of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with a wide cockpit view overlooking vast plains and distant mountains under an overcast golden hour sky, gradually dropping toward the industrial ground below. As the vehicle slows, the landscape shifts from open highway interchanges and power pylons to the looming silhouette of a massive city skyline. The scene then transitions abruptly from the wasteland into a dense urban corridor, where glass skyscrapers rise sharply on both sides and holographic towers begin to glow. Finally, the camera plunges deep into the heart of the city, navigating between massive neon billboards and passing other flying vehicles before the Arasaka tower dominates the view amidst a sea of artificial light.
